invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破580（基于ATR 6.65和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 580 (based on ATR 6.65 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.094（入场价，基于风险管理）或融资费率超过0.03%（轧多风险加剧），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.094 (entry price, based on risk management) or funding rate exceeds 0.03% (long squeeze risk intensifies).
